name: Grupo Cementos de Chihuahua, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Cementos de Chihuahua, S.A.B. de C.V., through its subsidiaries, produces, distributes, and sells gray Portland cement, ready-mix concrete, aggregates, and other construction materials in Mexico and the United States. It offers cement products, such as general purpose, high sulfate resistant, and oil well cement products; asphalt; and building materials, such as fabric or plastics, tools, dry goods, pavers or centurion stones, and rebars. The company also provides special products comprising Versabind, a ground blend of hydraulic calcium silicates and calcium sulfate used as filler in asphalt mixes as a replacement for lime; Microsilex, a silica product; Komponent to be used in floors; and Rapid Set, a fast-setting hydraulic cement. Grupo Cementos de Chihuahua, S.A.B. de C.V. distributes its products through distribution centers and independent wholesale distributors. The company was founded in 1941 and is based in Chihuahua, Mexico. Grupo Cementos de Chihuahua, S.A.B. de C.V. operates as a subsidiary of CAMCEM, S.A. de C.V.
